meeting: Headliner Breakout: EIP-8141 Frame Transaction (#2) - March 25, 2026

frame_transaction_proposal.highlight: Three mempool strategies proposed: sender-only, canonical paymaster, full 7562
Strategy 2 (canonical paymaster) recommended; serves 95%+ use cases safely
Option to ship frames in protocol without day-one mempool support
Three fixed axioms: frames series, approval/gas payment, frame introspection

validation_and_security.highlight: Canonical paymaster avoids 7562 reputation system complexity for untrusted code
Native client integration planned; not bolted-on like 4337 tracing
Precompile approach: whitelist set with known validation costs
Mempool safety and protocol flexibility must balance; approval complexity acknowledged

signature_schemes_and_precompiles.highlight: Proposal: existing precompiles (K1, R1) auto-approve with approval bits
In-protocol enshrined delegation enables precompile-based validation
Falcon signature analysis has calculation errors; concerns about hardware implementation
Vectorized math precompile (NumPy-style) enables flexible PQ algorithms

client_team_positions.highlight: Nethermind concerns: EVM in pool, complex authorization frame rules
Besu majority favors no headliner but won't block if consensus emerges

use_cases_and_philosophy.highlight: Key motivator: experiment with signatures without forks via single extension point
Generic in-protocol; restrictive in mempool; exceptional cases use private flow
Privacy protocols and complex multisig benefit from EVM-based validation

configuration_and_delegation.highlight: 8130 cannot be ERC on current 8141; needs delegation mechanism
8141 seen as superset; specific account patterns implementable on top
Configuration should live in user account for optimization

organizational.highlight: 8141 not finished; starting point for discussion with strongly-held frame principles
Authors + client teams finalize; 12+ months to fork allows iteration
Headliner decision tomorrow 1400 UTC on ACDE; ecosystem feedback welcome

action_items.action: Add strategy 4/5 (whitelist-based, more restrictive) to mempool strategy document
Provide feedback on 8141 via Discord Ether R&D or Telegram AA Mafia

targets.target: March 26, 2026 1400 UTC - ACDE headliner decision for 8141
